payload.answer: The new statement appears to update the project state of the same Brain Slack agent from planned/open to MVP implemented. This is a candidate temporal status transition, not a final backend policy decision.
citations: Existing project state: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open.
New: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.
